serviceNotes.engine oil: S65 high-rev V8: BMW M maintenance specifies shorter oil intervals than standard 3 Series (often 15,000 km / 12 months EU); track use warrants ~8,000 km changes. Sources: BMW M E9x service literature.
serviceNotes.air cleaner element: High-flow V8 intake; ~60,000 km filter planning.
serviceNotes.spark plugs: Eight spark plugs; high-performance engine—many schedules specify ~45,000–60,000 km; confirm M supplement.
serviceNotes.check front brake pads: Performance use: inspect every 20,000 km or before track events.
serviceNotes.M-DCT gearbox fluid: E9x M3 with M-DCT (GS7D36SG): DCT fluid service at ~60,000 km for shift quality and clutch longevity.
serviceNotes.manual gearbox fluid: E9x M3 6-speed manual: gear oil replacement at ~60,000 km.
serviceNotes.differential fluids: M limited-slip rear axle: ~60,000 km fluid refresh recommended.
serviceNotes.coolant flush: High-rev engine: preventive coolant maintenance ~100,000 km.
serviceNotes.valve adjustment: S65 uses solid lifters; BMW specifies valve clearance checks at defined intervals—verify the M maintenance table for your model year (planning row ~50,000 km).
